description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”) being driven in conventional mode was involved in a collision while traveling on westbound 
Mason Street between Yacht Road and Javowitz Street. While making a right turn onto an unmarked road, the driver of the Cruise AV made 
contact with a bicyclist traveling in the eastbound, unprotected bicycle lane on Mason Street. The police were not called. (amended as of 
4/30/2019)
Go to Page 3
